pack_name: Versa Vibe Coding Skills Dictionary Pack

skills.title: Project Reader Skill
skills.purpose: Reads packs in correct order, builds project map, identifies next pending item and prevents coding before context is loaded.

skills.title: Spec Interpreter Skill
skills.purpose: Converts source-of-truth specs into tasks and separates nouns, states, actions, effects, screens and tests.

skills.title: Effect Chain Skill
skills.purpose: Defines what must happen after every action: database changes, status transition, tasks, jobs, notifications, audit and downstream effects.

skills.title: Screen Contract Skill
skills.purpose: Ensures every feature has a real screen contract with route, data, components, states, permissions and action wiring.

skills.title: Journey Test Skill
skills.purpose: Proves each feature end-to-end from screen action to API, DB state, downstream effect, audit and UI update.

skills.title: API Contract Skill
skills.purpose: Keeps routes, schemas, envelopes, errors, pagination, filtering, idempotency and public/private routing aligned to API contracts.

skills.title: Database Migration Skill
skills.purpose: Creates safe additive migrations with real tables, indexes, lifecycle fields, RLS, audit/idempotency/job tables and no destructive changes.

skills.title: Auth RBAC Scope Skill
skills.purpose: Ensures auth, staff/school separation, role/scope resolution and authorization are server-side and production-safe.

skills.title: Security Privacy Skill
skills.purpose: Applies threat model, privacy matrix, masking and least-privilege controls before completion is claimed.

skills.title: Audit Idempotency Skill
skills.purpose: Ensures write/high-risk actions are audit-backed, reasoned, retry-safe and idempotent.

skills.title: File Storage Signed URL Skill
skills.purpose: Ensures sensitive files use private storage, scoped short-lived signed URLs, download audit, expiry and revocation.

skills.title: Worker Queue Skill
skills.purpose: Implements long-running work with validated, idempotent, retryable, observable and auditable worker queues.

skills.title: Observability Skill
skills.purpose: Makes the app diagnosable using structured logs, redaction, metrics, alerts, health endpoints, traces and release monitoring.

skills.title: UI Design System Skill
skills.purpose: Keeps screens consistent, role-aware, responsive, accessible and aligned to approved components/tokens.

skills.title: Seed Data Skill
skills.purpose: Ensures demo/staging scenarios are loaded, privacy-safe and usable for journey tests.

skills.title: CI Deployment Skill
skills.purpose: Prevents local-only builds from being mistaken as staging or production complete.

skills.title: Completion Verification Skill
skills.purpose: Defines what done means and forces evidence-based completed/pending reporting.

skills.title: Gap Detection Skill
skills.purpose: Forces missing layers to be reported instead of silently improvised or hidden.
